title: BEM-670 verify table report
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists():
        return None
    try:
        return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except:
        return {'parse_error':True,'raw':p.read_text(errors='ignore')[:2000]}

def read(path):
    p=Path(path)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''

state=load('governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json')
runtime=read('governance/reports/curator_hourly_report_runtime.md')
delivery=read('governance/reports/curator_hourly_report_delivery.md')
workflow=read('.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml')
message=runtime
has_table='№  | Наименование' in message and 'Краткая суть' in message and 'Статус' in message
no_raw_events='Последние события' not in message and 'bem664_' not in message and 'bem665_' not in message
has_hour='Дата:' in message and '(UTC+3)' in message
sent=isinstance(state,dict) and state.get('telegram_delivery')=='sent'
workflow_hourly='schedule:' in workflow and "cron: '0 * * * *'" in workflow
checks=[
 {'name':'hourly_state_exists','pass':isinstance(state,dict),'evidence':'governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json'},
 {'name':'telegram_delivery_sent','pass':sent,'evidence':'governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json'},
 {'name':'message_has_readable_table','pass':has_table,'evidence':'governance/reports/curator_hourly_report_runtime.md'},
 {'name':'message_has_no_raw_bem_events','pass':no_raw_events,'evidence':'governance/reports/curator_hourly_report_runtime.md'},
 {'name':'message_has_date_hour','pass':has_hour,'evidence':'governance/reports/curator_hourly_report_runtime.md'},
 {'name':'workflow_runs_hourly','pass':workflow_hourly,'evidence':'.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml'}
]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='operator_table_report_delivered' if not failed else 'operator_table_report_not_fully_confirmed'
blocker=None if not failed else {'code':'OPERATOR_TABLE_REPORT_NOT_FULLY_CONFIRMED','failed':failed,'delivery_text':delivery[:500],'state':state}
result={'schema_version':'operator_table_report_delivery_verification.v1','bem':'BEM-670','status':status,'checks':checks,'hourly_state':state,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 16:09 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem670_verify_operator_table_report_delivery.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(result,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem670_verify_operator_table_report_delivery.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-670 | Verify Operator Table Report Delivery | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 16:09 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Checks'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x['name']+': '+('PASS' if x['pass'] else 'FAIL') for x in checks])+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem670_verify_operator_table_report_delivery','cycle_id':'bem670-verify-operator-table-report-delivery','source':'monitor','status':status,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 16:09 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem670_verify_operator_table_report_delivery']={'status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['operator_telegram_report_delivery_status']=status
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 16:09 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem670_verify_operator_table_report_delivery.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-670 '+status.upper()+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Verified canonical operator table hourly report structure, hourly schedule, raw-event suppression, and Telegram delivery state')
"""
No issue comments.
